concept: Custom oracle card system mapping QMDJ symbols to Western-friendly archetypes. QMDJ engine runs in backend, customer sees energy archetypes and oracle cards.
design_principle: Every card maps 1:1 to a real QMDJ symbol. The reading is REAL divination dressed in accessible language.

archetype_cards.description: 9 cards representing core energies (mapped from 九星 Nine Stars)

cards.light: Deep intuition, ability to navigate chaos, street-smart, resourceful
cards.shadow: Deception, addiction, getting lost in the dark, manipulation
cards.career: Unconventional paths, nightlife, underground markets, intelligence, investigation
cards.wealth: Hidden wealth, unexpected windfalls, high-risk investments
cards.relationships: Intense, secretive bonds; attracted to danger or forbidden connections

cards.light: Deep empathy, healing abilities, patience, nurturing presence
cards.shadow: Illness, stagnation, being drained by others, hypochondria
cards.career: Healthcare, wellness, counseling, social work, agriculture
cards.wealth: Slow and steady accumulation, real estate, land-based wealth
cards.relationships: Caretaker role, co-dependency risk, needs to set boundaries

cards.light: Bold leadership, quick execution, competitive edge, pioneer spirit
cards.career: Startups, sports, military, tech, anything requiring speed and courage
cards.wealth: Fast money through bold action, first-mover advantage
cards.relationships: Passionate but volatile; needs a partner who can match their energy

cards.light: Deep knowledge, academic success, mentorship, cultural refinement
cards.shadow: Overthinking, indecision, ivory tower detachment, elitism
cards.career: Education, consulting, writing, research, arts, spiritual teaching
cards.wealth: Wealth through knowledge and intellectual property
cards.relationships: Values intellectual connection; needs mental stimulation

cards.light: Natural mediator, integrates all forces, unshakeable core, adaptability
cards.shadow: Indecision from seeing all sides, lack of identity, being everyone's everything
cards.career: Management, coordination, platform businesses, hub roles
cards.wealth: Wealth through connecting others, platform economics, middleman advantage
cards.relationships: The glue in any group; risk of losing self in service to others

cards.light: Master strategist, organizational genius, fair judgment, strong leadership
cards.career: Law, engineering, finance, executive leadership, government
cards.wealth: Systematic wealth building, structured investments, corporate success
cards.relationships: Loyal but emotionally reserved; shows love through structure and provision

cards.light: Sharp insight, ability to cut through BS, truth-telling, surgical precision
cards.shadow: Destructive criticism, self-sabotage, tearing things down without rebuilding
cards.career: Critic, editor, surgeon, demolition, reformation, investigative journalism
cards.wealth: Wealth through eliminating waste, restructuring, turnaround situations
cards.relationships: Brutally honest; can wound with words; needs to learn gentleness

cards.light: Unshakeable reliability, long-term vision, generosity, quiet strength
cards.shadow: Stubbornness, resistance to change, being taken for granted
cards.career: Real estate, construction, long-term investments, charitable work
cards.wealth: Slow but massive accumulation, generational wealth, property
cards.relationships: The rock in any relationship; loyal to a fault; needs appreciation

cards.light: Charisma, creative genius, ability to inspire, magnetic presence
cards.shadow: Vanity, burnout, drama, attention addiction, volatility
cards.career: Entertainment, marketing, design, social media, public speaking
cards.wealth: Wealth through personal brand, visibility, and creative output
cards.relationships: Magnetic but high-maintenance; needs constant admiration and spark

pathway_cards.description: 8 cards representing life pathways and doors of opportunity (mapped from 八门 Eight Doors)

cards.meaning: A time of ease and support. Help comes naturally. Rest and receive.
cards.advice: Don't force it. Good things are flowing to you. Accept help gracefully.

cards.meaning: Something must end for the new to begin. A cycle is closing.
cards.advice: Release what no longer serves you. Honor the past, then walk forward.

cards.meaning: Time to act decisively. Competition is fierce. Strike first.
cards.advice: Move fast but don't be reckless. Channel aggression into action.

cards.meaning: Not everything should be revealed. Protect your plans. Work in silence.
cards.advice: Keep your cards close. Now is for preparation, not declaration.

cards.meaning: Step into the light. Your work is ready to be seen.
cards.advice: Express yourself boldly. Beauty and truth attract abundance now.

cards.meaning: Doors are opening. Career and leadership opportunities appear.
cards.advice: Step through with confidence. This is your moment to lead.

cards.meaning: Unexpected disruption. Legal or verbal conflict. Stay sharp.
cards.advice: Don't react emotionally. Think before you speak. Prepare for surprises.

cards.meaning: Abundance is growing. Investments bear fruit. New life emerges.
cards.advice: Plant seeds now. Nurture what you've started. Wealth is coming.

guardian_cards.description: 8 cards representing spiritual guardians and cosmic forces (mapped from 八神 Eight Deities)

cards.meaning: You are divinely protected. The highest forces are aligned in your favor.
Things are not what they seem. Trust your intuition over appearances.
Quiet, invisible support surrounds you. A woman or yin force is helping.
Partnerships and collaborations are blessed. Seek union and agreement.
Raw power is present. Respect the danger. Surgical precision needed.
Beware of hidden agendas. Someone may not be truthful. Trust your gut.
Build your foundation quietly. Now is for grounding, not flying.
Think big. The sky supports your ambition. Expand boldly.

energy_interactions.description: How stem pairs (天盘+地盘) translate to energy dynamics. This is the 十干克应 in oracle language.
energy_interactions.note: To be expanded with full 十干克应 research. Below are key patterns.

patterns.same_element_meeting: Your energy is doubled — pure expression of this force. Intense but one-dimensional.
patterns.generating_cycle: One energy feeds the other. Flow and support. Natural growth.
patterns.controlling_cycle: Tension between forces. Challenge that builds strength if handled well.
patterns.clash: Direct conflict. Something must give. Transformation through crisis.
patterns.harmony: Two forces dance together. Effortless synergy. Blessed combination.

destiny_reading.description: Your core energy signature — who you are at the deepest level.

moment_reading.description: The energy of this exact moment — what forces are at play right now.

question_reading.description: Ask the Oracle a specific question and receive guidance.

compatibility_reading.description: How two energies interact — in love, business, or friendship.

year_ahead.description: Your energy forecast for the coming year.

presentation_format.energy_narrative: Weave the 3 cards into a cohesive story using 十干克应 as the underlying logic
presentation_format.tone: Wise, warm, direct. Like a trusted spiritual advisor. Not fluffy or vague.
presentation_format.no_chinese_characters: NEVER show 汉字 to the customer. All QMDJ terms are translated to oracle language.
presentation_format.authenticity_note: Always hint that this is 'powered by an ancient Eastern divination system' without getting technical
